query: SELECT a.id, a.titulo, a.descricao, a.macroId, a.prazo, cm.id as macroCompId, cm.nome as macroNome FROM actions a LEFT JOIN competencias_macros cm ON a.macroId = cm.id WHERE a.titulo = 'Cabelos';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT a.id, a.titulo, a.descricao, a.macroId, a.prazo, cm.id as macroCompId, cm.nome as macroNome FROM actions a LEFT JOIN competencias_macros cm ON a.macroId = cm.id WHERE a.titulo = 'Cabelos';
